title: LocalClr Method, Spel Class
parameters: LocalNumber	Integer expression representing which of 15 locals (integer from 1 to 15) to clear (undefine).
description: Clears a Local defined for the current robot.
see_also:
Local, LocalDef

LocalClr Example

VB Example:

m_spel.LocalClr(1)

C# Example:

m_spel.LocalClr(1);
